stem: On January 1, 2020, a streaming service's monthly fee was $12. It will increase by $0.75 on the first day of the year for the next 5 years. Which of the following functions best models the monthly fee, in dollars, x years after January 1, 2020?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The initial fee is $12 and it grows by $0.75 each year, so the fee after x years is 12 + 0.75x.

Choice A subtracts instead of adds. Choices B and D swap the constant and the rate.
